mapper.sql: ID, ODD_PLAN_ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, REPORT_START_TIME, REPORT_END_TIME, DURATION, REMARK, HOUR_METER_START, HOUR_METER_END
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL
ODD_PLAN_ID = #{oddPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
ORDER BY REPORT_START_TIME ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL( ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, ODD_PLAN_ID, REPORT_START_TIME, REPORT_END_TIME, DURATION, REMARK, HOUR_METER_START, HOUR_METER_END ) VALUES ( #{entity.id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.now}, #{entity.oddPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entity.reportStartTime}, #{entity.reportEndTime}, #{entity.duration, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entity.hourMeterStart, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{entity.hourMeterEnd, jdbcType=DECIMAL} )
SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
mapper.select:
SELECT ODD_PLAN_ID, LISTAGG(TO_CHAR(REPORT_START_TIME,'FMMM"月"DD"日"') ||TO_CHAR(REPORT_START_TIME,'HH24:MI')||'-' ||TO_CHAR(REPORT_END_TIME,'FMMM"月"DD"日"') ||TO_CHAR(REPORT_END_TIME,'HH24:MI'),', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY REPORT_START_TIME) REPORT_TIME FROM T_PRD_ODD_WORK_PLAN_DETAIL
ODD_PLAN_ID IN
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
GROUP BY ODD_PLAN_ID
